overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game showing a student character exploring Hogwarts castle at night. The character walks through illuminated stone courtyards, ascends staircases with other students, and traverses rooftop terraces with dramatic gothic architecture against a cloudy night sky.

events.description: camera pans upward to look at the tall central tower against the night sky
camera returns to forward facing position and begins walking

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard while looking around at the illuminated architecture and towers

entered.detail: tall gothic stone tower with illuminated windows and pointed roof
long stone building wing with multiple spires and lit windows
fortified stone wall with crenellations and attached towers
ornate stone lamp posts with warm glowing lights lining the courtyard
wet reflective stone tile flooring in the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a vast castle courtyard at night, dominated by a towering gothic central keep against a cloudy blue sky. The camera pans up to admire the architecture before walking forward across the wet stone pavement, passing warm glowing lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: main entrance stairs of the castle

events.description: two students in dark robes enter the frame walking ahead of the camera
begin ascending the wide stone staircase toward the castle entrance

agents.ego_description: following two other students up the main stairs toward the castle entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with red accents walking up the stairs ahead
second student walking alongside the first toward the entrance

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading up to the main castle entrance
arched stone doorway with warm light emanating from within

segments.scene_description: Two students in robes appear ahead as the camera approaches the grand staircase. The group ascends the wide stone steps together toward the illuminated castle entrance, with gothic architecture rising on both sides.

events.description: entering darker covered passage illuminated only by wall-mounted lanterns
emerging from stone archway onto open rooftop terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the stairs through the covered stone passage

entered.detail: enclosed stone stairway with steps worn smooth by age
rough-hewn stone block walls of the passage
iron bracket lamp casting warm orange light on the stone
gothic pointed arch marking the exit from the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, enclosed stairwell where artificial lantern light replaces the moonlight. Ascending through the narrow stone passage, they emerge through a gothic archway into an open rooftop terrace.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop terrace with statues and battlements

events.description: panning to view the large stone statue and surrounding castle towers
beginning to ascend secondary staircase along the outer wall

agents.ego_description: walking across the terrace and admiring the view of the castle towers and night sky

entered.detail: open stone platform with crenellated edges overlooking the castle
large weathered stone sculpture of a figure on a pedestal
multiple illuminated gothic towers rising against the night sky
decorative iron street lamp with glowing glass panels
crenellated stone defensive walls along the terrace edge
narrow stone steps leading up along the outer wall
narrow path along the top of the castle outer wall
dark silhouetted mountains visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the open rooftop terrace, the scene reveals a large stone statue and panoramic views of the castle's illuminated towers against the cloudy night sky. The character walks along the battlements and begins ascending a secondary staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated battlement walkway with mountain views

events.description: game UI text appears at bottom of screen indicating quest tracking feature
approaching the ornate iron gate at the end of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the outer wall toward a gated overlook

entered.detail: ornate wrought iron gate blocking the end of the walkway
elevated stone platform with decorative carved railings

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated battlement with mountains visible in the distance, a UI text overlay appears briefly. The character approaches an ornate iron gate at the end of the stone walkway, with the castle walls rising behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vast, moonlit castle courtyard up through the interior architecture to an elevated rooftop terrace. It begins by panning up toward a towering gothic keep before moving across wet stone pavement illuminated by warm lanterns. As the camera approaches a grand staircase, it joins two robed students in ascending toward the castle entrance, eventually shifting from the open night air into a darker, enclosed stairwell lit by artificial lanterns. The scene then opens through a gothic archway onto a rooftop terrace featuring a large stone statue and panoramic views of illuminated towers against a cloudy sky. Finally, the camera traverses the high battlements with distant mountains in view, moving along the stone walkway toward an ornate iron gate.
